label: UltraCompress evidence matrix
note: This evidence summary has been moved to NDA-only access during a documentation refresh. The canonical public registry of UltraCompress PPL-verified architectures (20 records: 19 transformer + 1 state-space model, the SSM with an explicit comparator-note caveat) is in docs/benchmarks.json at the repo root. Public model packs (PPL-verified subset published, others gated:manual under MOAT policy) are at huggingface.co/SipsaLabs. Per-model SHA-256 manifests and detailed eval-pipeline logs are available to partners under NDA — contact legal@sipsalabs.com.
